parent_stage_unit: MVP-02.04 admin UI/status view slice only
summary: PASS for current sprint MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001 only. The two prior blocking gaps are fixed: the current admin UI renders the cohort status through Russian labels and current git diff --check is clean. This verdict does not close full MVP-02.04, full MVP-02, the MVP stage or any human gate.
proven_scope: Minimal apps/admin Next.js scaffold and read-only cohort/code status view for the already verified backend DTO.
Typed local DTO/fixture boundary matching the proven backend code-status response.
Russian operator copy for current rendered success state, plus loading, error and empty states.

Privacy-safe operator rendering with no raw invite codes, lookup hashes, activation subject refs, employee fullName/email/phone, diagnostics/financial data or customer brand in managed admin source/fixture/rendered proof.
Generated-client implementation remains an explicit no-op because packages/api-client has no generator/artifacts.
Admin auth/role/audit policy and production real-data use remain out of scope and human-gated.

proof: apps/admin/components/status-labels.ts defines COHORT_STATUS_LABELS for PLANNED, ACTIVE and CLOSED.
apps/admin/tests/browser-smoke.mjs now expects "500 · Запланирована" and forbids "500 · PLANNED".
.agent/stages/mvp/raw/stage-fixer-mvp-02-admin-ui-status-view-001-admin-start-curl-20260511.html contains "500 · Запланирована" and no PLANNED token.
.agent/stages/mvp/raw/stage-fixer-mvp-02-admin-ui-status-view-001-git-diff-check-20260511.txt is empty from a passing fixer rerun.
.agent/stages/mvp/raw/stage-verifier-mvp-02-admin-ui-status-view-001-post-fix-git-diff-check-20260511.txt is empty from this fresh verifier rerun.

acceptance_criteria.detail: Backend/API/schema baseline is unchanged for this UI slice; git diff -- apps/api is empty.
apps/admin has a minimal Next.js scaffold with package scripts and focused checks.
Default route renders a read-only code-status view from a typed local DTO/fixture boundary.
Russian operator copy is proven for current rendered HTML; loading, error, empty and success states exist.
Success state shows cohort metadata, summary/funnel counts, status counts, filter/page state and paginated code rows.
Status filters use CREATED, ISSUED, RESERVED, ACTIVATED, REVOKED, EXPIRED and page size is bounded by MAX_PAGE_SIZE = 100.
Synthetic fixture mode is default and used for test/screenshot evidence.
Optional live mode is read-only GET and requires explicit synthetic tenant/cohort environment variables.

Guardrail scans and source inspection found no raw invite-code values, lookup hashes, activation subject refs, employee contact fields, diagnostics/financial data, customer brand or rendered raw cohort enum leakage.
Builder evidence records root make verify, make test-unit and make build with admin checks.
Admin package typecheck/test/build are credible in builder/fixer evidence; this verifier reran typecheck and test.

Builder system-Chrome browser smoke produced desktop/mobile success plus empty/error/loading screenshots. The success screenshots predate the label fix and still show PLANNED; current post-fix production HTML proof shows the Russian label and no PLANNED. Fixer Chrome rerun aborted before navigation, so screenshots were not refreshed and no browser was downloaded.
packages/api-client contains only .gitkeep and generated-client implementation remains out of scope.
Setup/runtime docs were updated for the admin app/root wrapper behavior; no product/stage scope change is required.
Evidence maps criteria to raw refs and includes fixer refresh refs; final PASS aliases are written by this verifier.
Human gates remain open and are not marked DONE.

checks.detail: Harness checks pass except stage-artifacts mismatch caused by status.json.latest_verified_sprint_contract_id still pointing to MVP-02-admin-code-status-view-001 while verifier-owned aliases now point to MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001.

browser_evidence.honest_limitation: The desktop/mobile success screenshots are valid state/layout evidence but stale for the cohort label and still show PLANNED. Current rendered production HTML is the post-fix proof for 500 · Запланирована and absence of PLANNED.

human_gates.gate: admin auth/role/audit policy for production use

remaining_orchestrator_actions: If accepting this PASS, update orchestrator-owned status/backlog/feature_list/progress aliases for MVP-02-admin-ui-status-view-001; this verifier did not edit those files.
Rerun verify_harness.py after orchestrator-owned status alias sync; this verifier run records the expected mismatch in post-fix-verify-harness-after-verdict.
Do not mark full MVP-02.04, full MVP-02, the MVP stage or any human gate complete from this sprint verdict alone.
